title.comment: Title of the confirmation dialog when deleting a resource

messageX.source: Are you sure you want to delete the resource "{key}"? This action cannot be undone.
messageX.comment: Confirmation message when deleting a resource, interpolated with the resource key
messageX.es: ¿Seguro que desea eliminar el recurso "{key}"? Esta acción no se puede deshacer.
messageX.fr-ca: Êtes-vous certain de vouloir supprimer la ressource « {key} » ? Cette action est irréversible.
